posts.author: TPCouriers (Carla)
posts.cookedHtml:
I love that auto-fills suggest the most commonly used text when you start entering data, and also love that this reflects more recent data rather than just overall data. We use this feature a lot!

It would be great to have something similar when adding a new column.

Currently we’re offered Essentials and Super Useful, and for anything else we need to click More, where I generally just search as its quicker.

If we could have another section in the initial popup for Recent, even if it was just 2 most recent types created, that would be very helpful.

For context, I’m currently adding the same HOUR column to 10 different boards, including changing to 24HR, setting view restrictions, and then creating an automation.
